title: rubus montanus var. citriodorus
intro: Rubus montanus var. citriodorus, also known as the mountain raspberry or lemon raspberry, is a variety of raspberry plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to help reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus montanus var. citriodorus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and reduce symptoms of various health conditions.
